controls.title: AI Policy
controls.statement: Establish, document, and maintain an organizational policy for the development and use of AI systems, aligned with business objectives and other policies.

controls.title: Internal Organization
controls.statement: Define AI roles and responsibilities and establish a process for reporting concerns about the organization's AI systems.

controls.title: Resources for AI Systems
controls.statement: Identify and document the resources — data, tooling, compute, human competence — needed across the AI system lifecycle.

controls.title: AI System Impact Assessment
controls.statement: Establish a process to assess the potential impacts of AI systems on individuals, groups, and society throughout their lifecycle.

controls.title: AI System Lifecycle
controls.statement: Define and apply responsible processes for the design, development, verification, deployment, operation, and retirement of AI systems.

controls.title: Data for AI Systems
controls.statement: Manage data used in AI systems: provenance, quality, preparation, and governance appropriate to the system's purpose.

controls.title: Information for Interested Parties
controls.statement: Provide appropriate information to users and affected parties about AI system capabilities, limitations, and intended use.

controls.title: Use of AI Systems
controls.statement: Establish responsible-use objectives and controls for how AI systems are operated and consumed within and beyond the organization.

controls.title: Third-Party and Customer Relationships
controls.statement: Manage AI-related responsibilities, risks, and obligations across suppliers, partners, and customers in the AI value chain.
